description: Renders a parametric 3D surface from component functions x(u,v), y(u,v), z(u,v) over two parameter ranges.
utility: Plot a parametric 3D surface using u and v parameters

arguments.name: graph
arguments.description: The 3D graph container created with g3d()

arguments.name: x(u,v)
arguments.description: X component as a function of u and v, in quotes

arguments.name: y(u,v)
arguments.description: Y component as a function of u and v, in quotes

arguments.name: z(u,v)
arguments.description: Z component as a function of u and v, in quotes

arguments.name: uRange
arguments.description: Parameter domain for u. Default: 0 to 2π

arguments.name: vRange
arguments.description: Parameter domain for v. Default: 0 to π

arguments.name: fillOpacity
arguments.description: Surface fill opacity from 0 to 1 - e.g., fo(0.6)

alternates.description: Parametric surface with two parameter ranges
Parametric surface with color and fill opacity

examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
torus = paraplot3d(G, "(2+cos(v+2*u))*cos(u)", "(2+cos(v+2*u))*sin(u)", "sin(v+2*u)", range(0, 2*pi), range(0, 2*pi), c(teal), fo(0.6))

G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
S = paraplot3d(G, "cos(u)*sin(v)", "sin(u)*sin(v)", "cos(v)", range(0, 2*pi), range(0, pi))

examples.scenario: Klein bottle surface with full opacity
examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(4,39), view(18.6, 17.4))
klein = paraplot3d(G, "(2+cos(u/2)*sin(v)-sin(u/2)*sin(2*v))*cos(u)", "(2+cos(u/2)*sin(v)-sin(u/2)*sin(2*v))*sin(u)", "sin(u/2)*sin(v)+cos(u/2)*sin(2*v)", range(0, 2*pi), range(0, 2*pi), c(teal), fo(1))

examples.scenario: Sphere octant with variable radius (one of 8 octants)
examples.expression:
var_r = variableanimator(at(3,6.7), "r", 4, 6, "r")
G = g3d(at(1.4,14.6), view(30, 30), range(-7, 7), "lhs")
oct1 = paraplot3d(G, "r*sin(u)*cos(v)", "r*sin(u)*sin(v)", "r*cos(u)", range(0, pi/2), range(0, pi/2), c(white), fc(white), fo(0.3))

examples.scenario: Spherical volume element (dV patch on sphere surface)
examples.expression:
dvOuter = paraplot3d(G, "r*sin(u)*cos(v)", "r*sin(u)*sin(v)", "r*cos(u)", range(pi/4, pi/4+pi/8), range(pi/2, pi/2+pi/6), c(dodgerblue), fc(dodgerblue), fo(0.95))
dvInner = paraplot3d(G, "(r-0.5)*sin(u)*cos(v)", "(r-0.5)*sin(u)*sin(v)", "(r-0.5)*cos(u)", range(pi/4, pi/4+pi/8), range(pi/2, pi/2+pi/6), c(dodgerblue), fc(dodgerblue), fo(0.85))

examples.scenario: Flat wall in xz-plane (partial disc for coordinate reference)
examples.expression: wallXZ = paraplot3d(G, "u*sin(v)", "0", "u*cos(v)", range(0, r), range(0, pi/2), c(white), fc(white), fo(1))

examples.scenario: Constant-theta and constant-phi side faces of volume element
examples.expression:
dvTheta1 = paraplot3d(G, "u*sin(pi/4)*cos(v)", "u*sin(pi/4)*sin(v)", "u*cos(pi/4)", range(r-0.5, r), range(pi/2, pi/2+pi/6), c(royalblue), fc(royalblue), fo(0.9))
dvPhi1 = paraplot3d(G, "u*sin(v)*cos(pi/2)", "u*sin(v)*sin(pi/2)", "u*cos(v)", range(r-0.5, r), range(pi/4, 3*pi/8), c(royalblue), fc(royalblue), fo(0.9))
